assertions.title: Send invitation with role assignment

steps.action: Owner opened Members panel and sent invite to orgmgmt_invite_g1_viewer_20260416a@example.com with Viewer role
steps.expected: Pending invitation shows email with Viewer role
steps.observed: Pending invitation displayed with Viewer role

steps.action: Owner sent invite to orgmgmt_invite_g1_admin_20260416a@example.com with Admin role
steps.expected: Pending invitation shows email with Admin role
steps.observed: Pending invitation displayed with Admin role

steps.action: Checked role selector options in invite form
steps.expected: Viewer/Admin/Owner role options available
steps.observed: Only Viewer and Admin options were available; Owner option was missing

assertions.issues: Invite role selector does not expose Owner role required by assertion.

assertions.title: Invitation rejects invalid, duplicate, and existing-member emails

steps.action: Entered invalid email value "bad" and attempted Send Invite
steps.expected: Validation error shown for invalid email
steps.observed: Native email validation triggered (validationMessage: "Please include an '@' in the email address. 'bad' is missing an '@'.")

steps.action: Re-invited existing pending email orgmgmt_invite_g1_viewer_20260416a@example.com
steps.expected: Duplicate invite rejected with already-sent error
steps.observed: UI displayed "Invitation already sent to this email"

steps.action: Invited existing member email orgmgmt_invite_g1_owner_20260416a@example.com
steps.expected: Existing member invite rejected
steps.observed: UI displayed "User is already a member of this organization"

evidence.network: POST /api/orgs/:orgId/invite conflict responses observed for duplicate/existing-member attempts

assertions.title: Accept invitation adds user to org

steps.action: Registered/logged in as orgmgmt_invite_g1_viewer_20260416a@example.com
steps.expected: Invitation inbox shows org name and assigned role
steps.observed: Inbox showed OrgMgmt Invite G1 Org 20260416a with role viewer

steps.action: Clicked Accept on invitation
steps.expected: User joins org and org appears in organization selector/sidebar
steps.observed: Org appeared in selector and user loaded into org views

assertions.title: Decline invitation keeps user out of org

steps.action: Registered/logged in as orgmgmt_invite_g1_decline_20260416a@example.com
steps.expected: Pending invitation is visible
steps.observed: Invitation to OrgMgmt Invite G1 Org 20260416a was shown

steps.action: Clicked Decline
steps.expected: Invitation removed and user not added to org
steps.observed: Invitation disappeared; organization selector remained "No organizations"

assertions.title: Role-based permissions — viewer, admin, owner

steps.action: Validated viewer account across Org Chart/Hierarchy/Spreadsheet/Kanban/Compare and attempted writes
steps.expected: Viewer can browse views but cannot mutate data
steps.observed: Viewer could browse all views; write paths were blocked (disabled controls/read-only banner/no write requests; scenario create returned 403)

steps.action: Validated admin account capabilities
steps.expected: Admin can CRUD employees/scenarios but cannot manage members/delete org
steps.observed: Admin successfully created scenario and employee; Members panel showed list only (no invite/remove/change controls)

steps.action: Validated owner-exclusive org controls
steps.expected: Owner can rename org, delete org, transfer ownership, and manage members
steps.observed: Owner member-management controls worked, but no visible rename/delete-org/transfer-ownership controls were found in tested owner surfaces

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected 403 surfaced during viewer scenario-create attempt; no unexpected runtime crashes
evidence.network: Viewer: POST /api/orgs/:orgId/scenarios -> 403; Admin: POST /api/orgs/:orgId/scenarios and POST /api/scenarios/:scenarioId/employees observed; Owner: PATCH/DELETE /api/orgs/:orgId/members/:memberId observed

assertions.issues: Owner full-control requirement not fully met in tested UI: transfer ownership / delete organization / rename organization controls were not found.

assertions.title: Remove and change role of org members

steps.action: Owner changed orgmgmt_invite_g1_viewer_20260416a@example.com role from Viewer to Admin
steps.expected: Role updates in member list
steps.observed: Member role updated to Admin in members table

steps.action: Owner removed orgmgmt_invite_g1_admin_20260416a@example.com from org
steps.expected: Member disappears from list and loses org access
steps.observed: Member removed from list; removed user later logged in and saw "No organizations"

steps.action: Logged in as promoted user (former viewer)
steps.expected: New admin capabilities available immediately
steps.observed: Add Employee/New Scenario were enabled and promoted user could create a new scenario

evidence.network: PATCH /api/orgs/:orgId/members/:memberId (role change), DELETE /api/orgs/:orgId/members/:memberId (remove), and POST /api/orgs/:orgId/scenarios (promoted member capability) observed

assertions.title: Viewer role blocked consistently across all 5 views

steps.action: Org Chart: attempted node drag as viewer
steps.expected: Write attempt blocked
steps.observed: Drag attempt produced no move/write request

steps.action: Hierarchy: attempted drag/reorder as viewer
steps.expected: Write attempt blocked
steps.observed: Drag attempt produced no move/write request

steps.action: Spreadsheet: attempted inline edit and typed into selected cell
steps.expected: No edit commit/write
steps.observed: No active AG Grid editor state and no employee write request

steps.action: Kanban: attempted card drag as viewer
steps.expected: Write attempt blocked
steps.observed: Cards were disabled; drag attempt generated no write request

steps.action: Detail panel: attempted edit/save path as viewer
steps.expected: Save path blocked
steps.observed: UI showed "Viewer role — read-only access" and no employee write request was sent

evidence.network: No write requests captured during viewer modification attempts across OrgChart/Hierarchy/Spreadsheet/Kanban/DetailPanel

frictions.description: Immediately after invitation acceptance/login, org data sometimes rendered as empty until a page reload.
frictions.resolution: Used explicit reload + network-idle wait before asserting data-dependent behavior.

frictions.description: agent-browser network log output is verbose/repetitive and does not include HTTP status codes directly.
frictions.resolution: Correlated network endpoint presence with UI outcomes and console errors (e.g., expected 403) for enforcement checks.

frictions.description: Invalid-email rejection surfaced via native HTML validation message instead of a persistent in-app error banner.
frictions.resolution: Captured browser validation state/message and screenshot after invalid input attempt.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 2 failed. Failures: VAL-ORG-001 (Owner invite role option missing) and VAL-ORG-005 (owner full-control controls for rename/delete/transfer not found in tested UI surfaces).
